ddls:
CREATE TABLE "alloys" (
  "alloy_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alloy state */,
  "alloy_state" TEXT /* Alloy state (e.g., 6063-T5, 6061-T6) */,
  "alloy_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the alloy state */,
  "alloy_composition" TEXT /* Chemical composition of the alloy */,
  "alloy_temperature_range" TEXT /* Temperature range in which the alloy can be used */,
  "alloy_strength" TEXT /* Strength of the alloy (e.g., tensile strength) */,
  "alloy_corrosion_resistance" TEXT /* Corrosion resistance of the alloy */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alloy_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "alloy_id" INTEGER /* ID of the alloy state */,
  "dimension_a" REAL /* Dimension A of the product (in inches) */,
  "dimension_b" REAL /* Dimension B of the product (in inches) */,
  "wall_thickness_1" REAL /* First wall thickness of the product (in inches) */,
  "wall_thickness_2" REAL /* Second wall thickness of the product (in inches) */,
  "product_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the product */,
  "product_weight" REAL /* Weight of the product */,
  "product_material_cost" REAL /* Cost of materials for the product */,
  "product_production_cost" REAL /* Cost of production for the product */,
  "product_selling_price" REAL /* Selling price of the product */,
  "product_image_url" TEXT /* URL to an image of the product */,
  "product_created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the product was created */,
  "product_updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the product was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_alloy_id FOREIGN KEY ("alloy_id") REFERENCES alloys ("alloy_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inventory" (
  "inventory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inventory entry */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product in stock */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the inventory (e.g., warehouse, storage) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date the inventory was last updated */,
  "inventory_cost" REAL /* Total cost of the inventory */,
  "inventory_safety_stock" INTEGER /* Safety stock level for the product */,
  "inventory_reorder_level" INTEGER /* Reorder level for the product */,
  "inventory_last_checked" TEXT /* Date the inventory was last checked */,
  "inventory_manager_id" INTEGER /* ID of the inventory manager responsible for this entry */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inventory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_inventory_manager_id FOREIGN KEY ("inventory_manager_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sales_orders" (
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sales order */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer placing the order */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product ordered */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product ordered */,
  "order_date" TEXT /* Date the order was placed */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the order (e.g., pending, shipped, canceled) */,
  "order_total_cost" REAL /* Total cost of the order */,
  "order_delivery_date" TEXT /* Expected delivery date */,
  "order_payment_status" TEXT /* Payment status of the order (e.g., paid, unpaid) */,
  "order_notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments related to the order */,
  "sales_representative_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sales representative handling the order */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_orders_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_orders_sales_representative_id FOREIGN KEY ("sales_representative_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_orders_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "customer_name" TEXT /* Name of the customer */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the customer */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the customer */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the customer */,
  "customer_type" TEXT /* Type of customer (e.g., business, individual) */,
  "customer_credit_limit" REAL /* Credit limit for the customer */,
  "customer_discount_rate" REAL /* Discount rate for the customer */,
  "customer_payment_terms" TEXT /* Payment terms for the customer */,
  "customer_tax_id" TEXT /* Tax ID of the customer */,
  "customer_website" TEXT /* Website of the customer */,
  "customer_notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments related to the customer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., production staff, sales representative, inventory manager) */,
  "user_password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed version of the user's password */,
  "user_last_login" TEXT /* Date and time the user last logged in */,
  "user_status" TEXT /* Status of the user (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "user_department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "user_supervisor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user's supervisor */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_user_supervisor_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_supervisor_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
